category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/sullo/nikto describes Nikto as a web server scanner.
source_facts.description says Nikto is a web server scanner.
display_name_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/sullo/nikto uses the name nikto/Nikto.
docs_sources: Official repository README links full documentation to https://github.com/sullo/nikto/wiki.
Official repository README links the project site at https://cirt.net/Nikto2.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/sullo/nikto, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository language summary shows Perl as the primary implementation language.
source_facts.description identifies a web server scanner.
source_facts.executables lists nikto as a command-line executable.
